name: sfnl-pptx
description: Idea-to-proof pipeline for Social Finance NL branded PowerPoint decks: research (bronnendossier), storyboard, free-form HTML slide composition built via html2pptx + PptxGenJS with native editable charts, a mandatory visual render loop, adaptive review, and a full render proof.

interface.shortDescription: Generate and proof Social Finance NL branded PowerPoint decks.
interface.longDescription: Composition-first deck generation and QA for Social Finance NL presentations: free-form HTML slides converted to editable PowerPoint via html2pptx + PptxGenJS, with research, storyboard design, a mandatory visual render loop, adaptive review, and final proofing.
defaultPrompt: Maak een SFNL deck op basis van deze briefing.
Review this SFNL .pptx against the delivery rubric.
Run a final proof on this SFNL deck.
